items.name_en: 🔥 Mini Soft Calfskin Pebble Bucket Bag Pebble 👜 Merges pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design style 💄 creating a unique innovative handbag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and practical functions 👄 adjustable shoulder strap length and suitable for multiple carrying ways, the unique twisted structure complements subtle details. 👛 This mini version is made of soft calfskin. 😻 Crossbody, shoulder or handheld *Adjustable detachable shoulder strap* Magnetic snap closure *Interior pocket* Synthetic leather lining* 🔥 Anagram engraved pebble 💥

items.name_en: Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Handbag
items.name_cn:
Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Handbag
Model 33705
The Hammock Flip handbag interprets a classic style with soft texture and practical function, while continuing the series' signature details. Featuring creative stitching and a flip structure, it easily converts from a shoulder bag to a close-fitting Hobo bag. This version is crafted from classic calfskin.
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic snap closure
One external zip pocket, two internal slip pockets
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
LOEWE hot-stamped or silver-plated
Dimensions 15-22-21
.

items.name_en: ✨Glossy Soft Calfskin Bob Fold-over Tote
items.name_cn:
✨Glossy Soft Calfskin Bob Fold-over Tote
Model: 1577
Dimensions: 47.5-39-9.5 cm
The Bob Fold-over Tote is a versatile interpretation of the Bobby shoe collection, featuring a unique cutout handle design. Its modular design allows for multiple carrying styles, serving as a tote, clutch, or crossbody bag. This version is made of glossy soft calfskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Zipper closure
One external zip back pocket, one internal zip pocket
Fabric lining
LOEWE embossed calfskin patch
cm·in

Glossy soft calfskin

items.name_en: Loewe's latest Flamenco Tote [Black and Red]
items.name_cn:
Loewe's latest Flamenco Tote [Black and Red]
Dimensions: 30cm length - 11.5cm base width - 38cm height
The design is eye-catching, with a harmonious and bright color combination.
Perfect for carrying a laptop, A4 files, and daily essentials to work. Large capacity and stylish.
A unique single-shoulder bag with smooth lines that looks elegant when worn. Suitable for both casual wear and dresses. The shoulder strap is adjustable for multiple carrying styles.
Made of ultra-fine Nappa leather with a matte leather interior, it feels very comfortable to the touch. The hardware also has a premium feel, a delight for detail lovers~^_^
